footer.tagline: The ultimate AI-powered competitive coding platform. Battle, learn, and master algorithms through interactive simulations.

topNav.notifSystemUpdateBody: Security patch deployed successfully for AI agent modules.
topNav.notifServerAlertBody: High CPU usage detected on Node workers in cluster 2.

hero.title: Turn Algorithms Into Action.
hero.subtitle: Write code. Run simulations. Compete in real-time. Watch your logic shape dynamic game worlds.

features.howSubtitle: Three steps to competitive coding mastery
features.powerfulSubtitle: Everything you need to become a competitive programming champion
features.step1Desc: Code your algorithm in JavaScript or Python. Use our Monaco-powered editor with syntax highlighting and intelligent autocomplete.
features.step2Desc: Run your code in a fast local execution environment. Our engine validates logic, checks edge cases, and measures performance in real-time.
features.step3Desc: Battle AI or real players. Climb leaderboards. Earn achievements. Watch your ranking rise as you master algorithms.
features.f1Desc: Compete against AI or real players in live coding challenges. See your opponent's progress in real-time.
features.f2Desc: Watch your algorithms come alive through interactive game simulations. See every step visualized.
features.f3Desc: Track your runtime, memory usage, and optimization metrics. Compare with top performers.
features.f4Desc: Access hundreds of algorithm challenges from easy to expert. New problems added weekly.
features.f5Desc: Compete with developers worldwide. Track your ranking and climb to the top.
features.f6Desc: Run code safely in isolated environments. Full support for JavaScript and Python.

games.sectionSubtitle: Choose a game. Write the logic. Watch it evolve.

arena.title: This Is The Product.
arena.subtitle: Experience the full competitive coding arena. Battle AI or real players in real-time.
arena.sampleDescription: Given an array of integers, return indices of two numbers that add up to target.

cta.title: Enter the Arena.
cta.subtitle: Master algorithms. Compete globally. Build elegant code.

tryChallenge.subtitle: No sign-up needed. Write code, hit run, and see the results.
tryChallenge.demoDescription: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.
tryChallenge.rule1: You may assume that each input would have exactly one solution.
tryChallenge.rule2: You may not use the same element twice.
tryChallenge.rule3: You can return the answer in any order.

challenges.badgeSub: Sign in to unlock algorithm drills, timed practice, and challenge history.
challenges.headline: Step into the challenge lab.
challenges.body: Access the full challenge flow only after authentication: curated problems, submission tracking, progress stats, and your training streak.
challenges.previewBody: Authentication unlocks the full challenge workspace, including timer-driven sessions and submission history.
challenges.card1Detail: Practice under pressure with structured timers
challenges.card2Detail: Inspect your attempts and iteration history
challenges.card3Detail: Keep your rank and XP progression in sync

battles.badgeSub: Sign in to join live battles, ranked runs, and post-match analytics.
battles.headline: Enter the battle arena.
battles.body: Unlock live matchups, strategic rounds, and your personal performance dashboard. The arena stays locked until your account is authenticated.
battles.previewBody: Authentication unlocks the full competition flow, including matchmaking, battle details, and summary screens.
battles.card1Detail: Queue against AI or upcoming opponents
battles.card2Detail: See rounds, scores, and timing breakdowns
battles.card3Detail: Keep your rank and XP in sync

signUp.joinDevs: Join 10,000+ developers competing daily. Solve problems, earn XP, and get scouted by top tech companies.
signUp.startCompeting: Start competing. Rise through the ranks.
signUp.passContainsUsername: Password cannot contain your username or email for security reasons
signUp.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

forgot.title: Reset Your Password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

emailSent.title: Check Your Email
emailSent.subtitle: If an account exists for {{email}}, a reset link has been sent.
emailSent.securityNotice: For security, we don't confirm whether an email is registered except via the email itself.

reset.codeSubtitle: Check your email for the 6-digit code and enter it below.
reset.createSubtitle: Choose a strong password to secure your account.
reset.enterEmailAndCode: Please enter your email and the 6-digit code.

resetSuccess.title: Password Updated Successfully
resetSuccess.subtitle: Your password has been changed. You can now log in with your new password.

resetExpired.title: Reset Link Expired
resetExpired.subtitle: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetExpired.validityNotice: Password reset links are valid for 1 hour. Please request a new one.

oauth.connecting: Establishing secure connection to cognitive cores...

context.sessionExpiredSignedOut: You have been signed out. Please log in again to continue.
context.sessionExpiredLogin: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

notFound.title: Sector Not Found
notFound.body: The navigation coordinates you provided do not exist on this platform. The page might have been removed, renamed, or temporarily offline.

maintenance.title: Under Maintenance
maintenance.body: AlgoArena is currently undergoing scheduled maintenance to improve your experience. We're upgrading our systems and will be back online soon. Thank you for your patience!

errors.network: Cannot reach the API. Please confirm the server is running.

battles.oneVsOneDesc: Create a battle waiting for a real opponent
battles.searchPlaceholder: Search battles by ID or participants...

challenges.pageSubtitle: Create and manage coding challenges with AI assistance or manually
challenges.importHelp: Supports structured `.json`, `.xlsx`, and `.xls` files that match the challenge schema.
challenges.noPublishedHint: Use the AI generator or create manually to add your first challenge.
challenges.describeChallengePlaceholder: Example: Create a challenge about finding the longest palindromic substring...
challenges.noPreviewHint: Please fill in the Title, Description, and at least one Test Case before previewing.
challenges.title: Title
challenges.editableHint: Review and edit the generated content before saving. Changes are applied before submission.
challenges.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.
challenges.duplicateWarning: Duplicate Challenge: {{message}}. The AI generated a challenge with an existing title. Click "Generate" again for a new challenge.
challenges.importSuccess: Imported {{imported}}/{{total}} challenges. {{skipped}} skipped due to duplicate titles.
challenges.importSkipped: Imported 0/1 challenges. 1 skipped due to duplicate titles: {{title}}
challenges.testCaseRequired: At least 1 complete test case (input & output) required
challenges.descriptionMinLength: Please provide a description of at least 10 characters.

activityLogs.pageSubtitle: Track, review, and audit all platform actions
activityLogs.confirmActionMessage: Are you sure you want to confirm this action? This marks it as reviewed and approved.
activityLogs.rollbackActionMessage: Warning: This will revert the entity to its previous state. This action itself will be logged. Are you sure?
activityLogs.noActivityLogsHint: No audit events match your filters. Actions will appear here as they occur.

leaderboards.noUsersFilter: No users match the selected filters
leaderboards.tryBroaderFilter: Try a broader rank or season scope.

challengePage.title: Challenges
challengePage.subtitle: Sharpen your skills. Climb your rank.
challengePage.noMatchTitle: No challenges match your current filters.
challengePage.noMatchHint: Try adjusting your filters or search query.
challengePage.inProgressSingle: You have a challenge in progress!
challengePage.startedTimeRemaining: Started {{time}} • {{percent}}% of time remaining for full XP
challengePage.alreadyOpenDesc: This challenge is already open in another tab. Please return to your existing session to continue.
challengePage.progressSaved: Your progress has been saved. Pick up where you left off!
challengePage.resumeToContinue: Please resume to continue working on your solution.
challengePage.pasteDisabledDesc: Paste is disabled after reset. Please type your solution manually.
challengePage.xpReducedDesc: You've spent over 1 hour on this challenge. XP reward is now 50% ({{reduced}} XP instead of {{full}} XP).
challengePage.fullXpAvailable: Full XP available for {{minutes}} more minute(s).
challengePage.fullXpAvailablePlural: Full XP available for {{minutes}} more minutes.
challengePage.progressWillBeSaved: Your progress will be saved automatically. You can return anytime to complete this challenge.
challengePage.workingFor: You've been working on this for {{minutes}} minute(s).
challengePage.xpReductionNote: Note: If you take longer than 1 hour total to complete this challenge, the XP reward will be reduced to 50%.
challengePage.resetWorkspaceDesc: This will erase your current code, reset the timer to 00:00, and disable paste for this challenge session.
challengePage.workspaceResetToastDesc: Timer reset and paste disabled. Type your solution manually.
challengePage.submissionPlaceholder: Your submission details will appear here after you submit a solution.
challengePage.aiAnalysisPlaceholder: AI analysis will appear here after submission.
challengePage.hintAvailableNow: You can request a hint now.
challengePage.hintLockedDesc: Hints unlock after enough time or failed attempts.
challengePage.pasteDisabledBanner: Paste disabled — type your solution manually
challengePage.pausedResume: Timer is paused. Resume to continue.
challengePage.solvedReview: Challenge solved. Review your submission details.
challengePage.clickToExecute: Click "Run Code" or "Submit Solution" to execute
challengePage.xpEarnedReduced: You earned {{xp}} XP (50% rate after 1 hour). Full XP: {{max}} XP.
challengePage.earnXpToUnlock: Earn XP to unlock your first rank tier.
challengePage.resumeBeforeSubmit: Please resume before submitting your solution.
challengePage.resubmissionDisabled: Resubmission is disabled for this challenge.
challengePage.challengeAlreadyOpenDesc: This challenge is already open in another tab. Please return to your existing session to continue.
challengePage.xpReducedAlert: You've spent over 1 hour on this challenge. XP reward is now 50% ({{reduced}} XP instead of {{full}} XP).

aiAgent.initialChatMessage: Hello! I'm your AlgoArena AI assistant. How can I guide you in the arena today?

aiAgent.unrecognizedDestination: I could not recognize that destination. Please state a valid platform page.
aiAgent.systemOffline: System offline. Unable to reach cognitive cores.
aiAgent.couldNotHear: I couldn't hear anything clearly. Try again.
aiAgent.speechFailed: Sorry, speech processing failed. Please try text input.
aiAgent.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone permissions.

profilePage.accountSubtitle: Manage your profile, security, and authentication
profilePage.dangerZoneDesc: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
profilePage.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure? You can't undo this action afterwards. Please enter your password to confirm.
profilePage.chooseMethodDesc: Select how you'd like to verify your identity when signing in.
profilePage.scanQrDesc: Open your authenticator app and scan the QR code, or enter the secret key manually.
profilePage.enterCodeApp: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
profilePage.emailVerificationDesc: We'll send a verification code to your registered email address.
profilePage.enterCodeEmail: Enter the 6-digit code from your email
profilePage.codeSentDesc: A verification code has been sent to {{email}}
profilePage.twoFactorEnabledDesc: Your account is now protected with two-factor authentication using
profilePage.avatarHint: Update your profile picture. Max size 5MB.
profilePage.dragDropHint: Or drag and drop an image here
profilePage.changePasswordDesc: Ensure your account stays secure with a strong password.
profilePage.passwordUpdatedDesc: Your password has been changed successfully.
profilePage.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account. You'll need to enter a verification code in addition to your password when signing in.
profilePage.twoFactorMethod_authenticator_desc: Use an app like Google Authenticator or Authy
profilePage.twoFactorMethod_email_desc: Receive a code via your registered email

speedChallenge.introDescPart2: to discover your true level. Your rank will be
speedChallenge.appliedToAccount: and applied to your new account.
speedChallenge.rule2: 15 minutes total — the clock is always ticking
speedChallenge.rule3: Solve in any order — skip and come back
speedChallenge.rule4: Your rank is computed from speed + problems solved
speedChallenge.rule5: Sign in after the test — your rank will be waiting!
speedChallenge.writeCodeFirst: ⚠️ Please write some code before submitting.
speedChallenge.someTestsFailed: Some test cases failed. Review your solution.
speedChallenge.unavailableDesc: The Speed Challenge placement test is currently disabled by administrators.
speedChallenge.sessionRestoredDesc: Your progress has been restored. Continue solving!
speedChallenge.tabHiddenDesc: The challenge is paused until you come back.
